season9ReleaseRoadmap.title: Marvel Rivals Season 9 Release Date and Roadmap
season9ReleaseRoadmap.intro: Marvel Rivals Season 9 is titled The Mystery of Thebes. The update focuses on the Thebes storyline, a fresh hero launch, Regenerative Shields, Ultimate energy changes, and a large Team-Up balance pass.

items.label: Season Name
items.details: The new season centers on Thebes and the Apocalypse storyline shown in the Season 9 reveal.

items.label: Release Date
items.details: Marvel Rivals Season 9 begins globally on July 10 UTC.

items.label: Main Update Focus
items.value: New hero, new map, global balance changes
items.details: The official Dev Vision highlights fresh gameplay changes, the latest hero, and a brand-new map.

items.label: Launch Hero
items.details: Jubilee arrives with Season 9 as a Strategist built around pyrotechnic energy, healing support, hover movement, and enemy knockback pressure.

items.label: New Map
items.details: Thebes is the Marvel Rivals Season 9 map addition tied to the season theme and convoy gameplay.

items.label: First Things to Check
items.value: Balance post, Team-Up changes, hero page, Twitch Drops
items.details: Players should review Ultimate energy changes, Regenerative Shields, hero adjustments, active events, and reward pages before jumping into ranked.

season9CodesRewards.title: Marvel Rivals Season 9 Codes and Free Rewards
season9CodesRewards.intro: Marvel Rivals rewards are handled through official bundle-code pages, in-game Bundle Code redemption, Twitch Drops, and limited event announcements. Use only official reward pages and the in-game mail system for claims.

items.name: Marvel Rivals Infinity Reward
items.reward: Marvel Rivals Infinity campaign in-game item
items.howToClaim: Open the official Marvel redeem page, follow the account and redemption flow, then claim the reward in game.

items.name: Bundle Code Menu
items.reward: Bundle rewards vary by official campaign
items.howToClaim: Press ESC in the lobby, open the system menu, choose Bundle Code, enter the official code, then click Use.

items.name: Twitch Drops
items.reward: Drop rewards from Marvel Rivals Twitch campaigns
items.howToClaim: Log in, link your Twitch account, watch Marvel Rivals category streams with Drops enabled, claim from Twitch inventory, then check in-game mail.

items.name: Event Rewards
items.reward: Limited-time cosmetics, campaign items, and event bonuses
items.howToClaim: Follow the official News, Events, and Twitch Drops pages during Season 9 and claim rewards before campaign deadlines.

season9NewHeroes.title: Marvel Rivals Season 9 New Heroes
season9NewHeroes.intro: The Season 9 reveal focuses on The Mystery of Thebes, Apocalypse, Jubilee, and The Hood. Jubilee is the immediate gameplay focus because she arrives with the July 10 UTC update as a Strategist support hero.

items.playstyle: Pyrotechnic support with healing, damage pressure, short aerial movement, healing bubbles, and crowd-control knockback.
keyAbilities: Ultimate knockback for displacement and environmental pressure
items.loreHook: Jubilee is tied to Apocalypse in the Season 9 story as the Horseman of Famine while trying to save her son Shogo.

items.playstyle: Villain-focused hero teased in the Season 9 reveal alongside Jubilee and Apocalypse.
items.loreHook: The Hood is positioned as part of the Season 9 character rollout connected to The Mystery of Thebes.

items.playstyle: Central trailer figure and storyline driver rather than a confirmed launch playable hero.
items.loreHook: Apocalypse drives the Thebes conflict and appears as the major narrative force in the Season 9 trailer.

season9TierListMeta.title: Marvel Rivals Season 9 Tier List and Meta
season9TierListMeta.intro: The Marvel Rivals Season 9 balance update reduces Ultimate energy generation for Vanguards, Duelists, and Strategists, introduces Regenerative Shields, and adjusts heroes around the new Team-Up system. These changes make shield sustain, Team-Up synergy, and reliable healing windows more important for ranked play.

items.whyItMatters: Doctor Strange gains more health and stronger Shield of the Seraphim, Devil Dinosaur and Groot receive stronger frontline durability, Cloak & Dagger gain broad healing buffs, Luna Snow increases healing boost power, and Ultron improves drone area healing.
items.playerTakeaway: Build around strong frontline protection and high-value healing windows.

items.whyItMatters: Psylocke gains extra value with Emma Frost or Cloak & Dagger, Mantis receives stronger effects with Star-Lord or Adam Warlock, Adam Warlock benefits from Ultron synergy, The Punisher gains damage back when paired with Daredevil, Elsa Bloodstone gains pellet damage with Devil Dinosaur, and Doctor Strange gains extra shield value with Invisible Woman.
items.playerTakeaway: Pick heroes with their intended Team-Up partners instead of judging them only by solo numbers.

items.whyItMatters: Season 9 adds Regenerative Shields to multiple frontline heroes. These shields begin recovering after avoiding damage for 5 seconds and fully recover chargeable shield points over the next 5 seconds.
items.playerTakeaway: Use cover, disengage timing, and re-entry paths to refresh shield value before the next fight.

items.whyItMatters: Hela gains higher Nightsword Thorn damage and freer Crow movement, Hawkeye gains faster and stronger partially charged arrows, and Storm gains Wind Blade damage. Cyclops, Iron Man, and The Punisher receive baseline damage reductions tied to overall Team-Up balance.
items.playerTakeaway: Expect stronger value from precise poke heroes, but check Team-Up pairings before locking damage picks.

items.whyItMatters: Strategist healing-to-Ultimate energy conversion drops from 75% to 60%, while multiple Strategists receive direct healing, utility, or Ultimate adjustments.
items.playerTakeaway: Healing output still matters, but Ultimate timing is slower, so teams should fight around cooldowns and positioning more carefully.

season9BattlePass.title: Marvel Rivals Season 9 Battle Pass and Skins
season9BattlePass.intro: The Deaths on the Nile Battle Pass connects Marvel Rivals Season 9 cosmetics to The Mystery of Thebes storyline. It focuses on themed costumes, cosmetic progression, and a premium upgrade that permanently unlocks Battle Pass access for long-term claiming.

items.title: Battle Pass Theme
items.description: The Marvel Rivals Season 9 Battle Pass follows the aftermath of Apocalypse's fall, where unexplained deaths begin surfacing across the Nile-themed mystery.
highlights: Part of Season 9: The Mystery of Thebes
Launches with Season 9 on July 10 UTC
Uses the Faith Harvesting Engine as the seasonal reward framing

items.title: Main Reward Hook
items.description: The Battle Pass headline reward is 10 new costumes, making it the core cosmetic track for Season 9 collectors.
highlights: Focused on Season 9 mystery and ancient Thebes styling
Designed for players who want themed hero looks

items.title: Premium Battle Pass
items.description: Upgrading to the premium Battle Pass permanently unlocks the pass, so players can keep progressing through premium rewards over time.
highlights: Premium ownership keeps the pass accessible
Good for players who cannot finish every reward immediately
Gameplay heroes remain free, so the pass is mainly cosmetic value

items.title: Buy or Skip Guide
items.description: The pass is most useful for players who want Marvel Rivals Season 9 costumes, profile cosmetics, and themed progression.
highlights: Buy for costumes and account cosmetics
Skip if you only care about matches, heroes, and balance changes
Check the in-game preview before spending currency

season9PatchNotes.title: Marvel Rivals Season 9 Patch Notes
season9PatchNotes.intro: Marvel Rivals Season 9 is a large gameplay update, not just a hero patch. The biggest changes are slower Ultimate generation, the arrival of Regenerative Shields, broad Team-Up anchor bonus removals, and targeted buffs or nerfs across Vanguard, Duelist, and Strategist heroes.

items.title: Global Ultimate Energy Changes
items.summary: Ultimate generation is slower across damage and healing sources.
details: Vanguards and Duelists: damage-to-energy conversion reduced from 70% to 55%.
Strategists: healing-to-energy conversion reduced from 75% to 60%.
Strategists: damage-to-energy conversion reduced from 75% to 55%.

items.title: Regenerative Shields
items.summary: Season 9 introduces a new health type that rewards avoiding damage.
details: Regenerative Shields follow the same logic as base Health for percentage-based healing and damage.
After avoiding damage for 5 seconds, shields begin regenerating automatically.
Chargeable shield points fully recover over the next 5 seconds.

items.title: Vanguard Highlights
items.summary: Several frontliners trade raw health for Regenerative Shields or receive survivability tuning.
details: Captain America changes from 600 base Health to 300 base Health plus 300 Regenerative Shield.
Hulk changes from 650 base Health to 400 base Health plus 300 Regenerative Shield, while Heavy Blow damage rises from 40 to 45.
Doctor Strange gains 650 base Health and Shield of the Seraphim increases from 700 to 850 shield value.
Devil Dinosaur base Health increases from 750 to 850.

items.title: Duelist Highlights
items.summary: Season 9 adjusts poke damage, mobility, and Team-Up-driven burst potential.
details: Cyclops has Optic Blast damage reduced from 25 to 21 and both Propulsion Burst and Optic Ascent cooldowns increased from 12s to 15s.
Hela's Nightsword Thorn base damage increases from 70 to 80 and Astral Flock gains free directional flight.
Iron Man receives Repulsor Blast and Unibeam reductions to offset strong Team-Up synergy.
Psylocke gains stronger partner effects with Emma Frost and Cloak & Dagger.

items.title: Strategist Highlights
items.summary: Support heroes receive healing, ammo, Ultimate, and partner-based adjustments.
details: Cloak & Dagger receive stronger direct healing, field healing, Veil of Lightforce healing, and Dagger Storm healing.
Luna Snow loses the damage boost from Number One Idol but increases its Healing Boost from 10% to 20%.
Rocket Raccoon's Repair Mode healing rises from 50 to 55, while C.Y.A. costs more Ultimate energy and gains distance falloff.
Ultron's Imperative: Firewall drone area healing increases from 30/s to 35/s.

items.title: Team-Up Anchor Bonus Cleanup
items.summary: Many flat Team-Up Anchor bonuses are removed so Season 9 can balance around specific partner effects.
details: Multiple heroes lose flat bonus Health, Damage Boost, or Healing Boost from Team-Up Anchor effects.
The patch now emphasizes direct partner bonuses, such as Doctor Strange with Invisible Woman or Adam Warlock with Ultron.
Team building matters more because specific hero pairs can change damage, healing, ammo, shielding, or survivability.

season9TeamUpGuide.title: Marvel Rivals Season 9 Team-Up Abilities Guide
season9TeamUpGuide.intro: The Marvel Rivals Season 9 Team-Up update removes many old flat anchor bonuses and shifts value toward direct hero-pair effects. Players should build teams by checking which partner bonuses improve their role: frontline stability, burst damage, healing output, or utility uptime.

items.title: Doctor Strange + Invisible Woman
items.description: When Invisible Woman is selected as Doctor Strange's Team-Up partner, Shield of the Seraphim gains an additional 150 shield value for a total of 1000.
bestFor: Teams that want stronger barrier uptime

items.title: Elsa Bloodstone + Devil Dinosaur
items.description: When Devil Dinosaur is selected as Elsa Bloodstone's Team-Up partner, Double-Barrel Blaster pellet damage increases from 4.5 to 5.

items.title: The Punisher + Daredevil
items.description: Punisher's baseline weapon damage is reduced, but pairing with Daredevil restores Adjudication and Deliverance damage through the Team-Up effect.

items.title: Psylocke + Emma Frost
items.description: With Emma Frost as partner, Psylocke gains more Bonus Health from Wing Shurikens, rising from 10 to 15 per hit.
bestFor: Players who need safer backline pressure

items.title: Psylocke + Cloak & Dagger
items.description: With Cloak & Dagger as partners, Psylocke's Psionic Crossbow single-hit base damage increases from 13 to 14.

items.title: Adam Warlock + Ultron
items.description: When Ultron is selected as Adam Warlock's Team-Up partner, Quantum Magic ammo capacity increases from 15 to 25.
bestFor: Support players who need fewer reload gaps

items.title: Mantis + Star-Lord
items.description: When Star-Lord is selected as Mantis's Team-Up partner, Healing Flower improves from 10 plus 2.5% of target max Health per second to 15 plus 3% per second.

items.title: Mantis + Adam Warlock
items.description: When Adam Warlock is selected as partner, Mantis increases self-healing from 12.5/s to 17.5/s during Natural Anger.

season9BeginnerGuide.title: How to Start Marvel Rivals Season 9
season9BeginnerGuide.intro: Marvel Rivals is a free-to-play Super Hero team-based PvP shooter with fast 6v6 combat, destructible environments, and Team-Up abilities. Season 9 adds new balance rules, Regenerative Shields, and new Team-Up priorities, so beginners should learn the basics before chasing advanced meta picks.

items.title: Download the Game
items.description: Install Marvel Rivals on your preferred platform. Official download links cover Windows, Steam, Epic, Xbox Series X|S, PlayStation 5, PlayStation 5 Pro, and PlayStation 4.
tips: Steam lists the game as Free To Play.
PC players should check storage and hardware requirements before installing.
Use the official website or official store pages to avoid wrong downloads.

items.title: Learn the 6v6 Flow
items.description: Marvel Rivals is built around fast team fights where two teams battle with Marvel heroes and villains across changing, destructible maps.
tips: Stay near teammates instead of taking isolated fights.
Use map cover and destructible terrain to survive pushes.

items.title: Pick a Main Role
items.description: Start with one role, then learn one backup role. Vanguards hold space, Duelists pressure and secure eliminations, and Strategists keep allies alive through healing, buffs, and utility.
tips: Beginner-friendly path: one Vanguard, one Duelist, one Strategist.
Do not lock only damage heroes if the team lacks frontline or healing.
Watch how your role changes your positioning.

items.title: Use Team-Up Abilities
items.description: Team-Up abilities are a core Marvel Rivals mechanic. Season 9 makes partner choices more important because many bonuses now depend on specific hero pairings.
tips: Check your team's heroes before locking your pick.
Try simple pairs like Doctor Strange with Invisible Woman or Adam Warlock with Ultron.
Change heroes if your team composition has no useful synergy.

items.title: Read the Season 9 Patch Basics
items.description: Before ranked play, learn the Marvel Rivals Season 9 changes to Ultimate energy, Regenerative Shields, and role balance.
tips: Ultimates build slower from damage and healing than before.
Regenerative Shields recover after avoiding damage.
Heroes with shield changes may need different retreat timing.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Marvel Rivals Season 9

questions.question: What is Marvel Rivals Season 9: The Mystery of Thebes?
questions.answer: Marvel Rivals Season 9 is titled The Mystery of Thebes. It adds a new hero, a new Thebes convoy map, Regenerative Shields, Team-Up system changes, and a large balance update on July 10 UTC.

questions.question: When does Marvel Rivals Season 9 start?
questions.answer: Marvel Rivals Season 9 begins globally on July 10, 2026 UTC. Players should check the balance post, Team-Up changes, and reward pages before the season goes live.

questions.question: Who is the new hero in Marvel Rivals Season 9?
questions.answer: Jubilee is the Marvel Rivals Season 9 launch hero, arriving as a Strategist with pyrotechnic healing, hover movement, and knockback utility. The Hood is teased as the next Season 9 roster addition.

questions.question: What is included in the Marvel Rivals Season 9 Battle Pass?
questions.answer: The Marvel Rivals Season 9 Battle Pass is Deaths on the Nile. It centers on 10 new costumes and themed progression, with a premium upgrade that permanently unlocks the pass for long-term claiming.

questions.question: Where can I download and play Marvel Rivals Season 9?
questions.answer: You can play Marvel Rivals Season 9 on Steam, Epic, Xbox Series X|S, PlayStation 5, PlayStation 5 Pro, and PlayStation 4. The game is free to play, and Season 9 content unlocks on July 10 UTC.

questions.question: Is Marvel Rivals Season 9 free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Marvel Rivals Season 9 is free to play. All gameplay heroes are free, and the Battle Pass only adds cosmetic rewards, so you can enjoy the full season without spending money.
